title: Consolidate handoff.md into ai docs
description: Review new handoff.md, merge any unique planning context into ai docs/README as needed, and delete handoff.md if redundant.

logs.msg: Reviewed handoff.md, preserved the unique repo-bootstrap and task-tracker state in ai/STATUS.md, and deleted handoff.md because it had become redundant and partially stale versus ai/{STATUS,DESIGN,DECISIONS}.md.
